textByHashes.a7ba385e40f2944254cd58e89c660dac46695af7: Hello, no-fur. What are you doing in my mistress's garden?
textByHashes.86c49529238605de8c9f91de4de62cc5a0e97c5c: If it's sq'irks you're after then you've come to the right place. We've got four seasons' worth of them.
textByHashes.9eb2441aeff0128032abede7555eb881d45a05f8: I'd be happy to help a friend of the feline.
textByHashes.e9b6e69c4a08340267899e72790ddac914b4de37: The Sphinx gave you that amulet, so she must hold you in high regard.
textByHashes.e48891bc13cd53037cf1786d11a8cf64dfb6a7a3: He and the Sphinx are as thick as thieves, but regardless, I think you've a bit of a cat feel about you.
textByHashes.909bfd89e3d57f5743badc5e67ca0db8b7bb28b5: Yes, the gardeners. Don't let them see you or they'll teleport you out here. They're very protective of their crops.
textByHashes.800e9209a93fc9d69ce495bcf40200dfc01074ec: I get in through gaps in the hedge. You are a little too big to squeeze through. I think you'll have to use the gates.
textByHashes.98b10ce6ac762312ac0d16404ab2ef461b13dc82: I think the gates are locked, so you'll have to have good Thieving skills to get in.
textByHashes.88961cb53effbae94bbb482671b2af8f1474675e: Exactly. The Sorceress likes to have a good supply of in-season sq'irks and herbs at all times.
textByHashes.b1e4b0614c53b1f4e82ce94efddfbb7d5b9f1b9b: Take a drink from the fountain.
textByHashes.1ee743f13f5d3a84adb0000ea6a3f1bfde7d789d: Every time I play with spiders in the Sorceress's house, her silly apprentice completely freaks out and teleports me here!
textByHashes.7cb4f57d4cc811ee18dd182e2082747a6fc8b5ec: No, silly! I drink from the fountain whenever I want to leave.
textByHashes.9cad393e7f68355171ed1230d8f5ac6cbb9c0799: I get this strange urge for sq'irks. It's quite peculiar. I think I may be addicted.
textByHashes.53fd636f5371c01c95f09756e1bd8a31547a3a15: Oh, he used to come here all the time. Then one day, he just stopped.
textByHashes.360f7154e3bcac904eb1d02ce4724e0393d70083: Del-Monty the cat, at your service.
textByHashes.41a7f19669a06f13dfff063f59fffea067c4c4db: No; as I said, I'm Del-Monty the cat, connoisseur of exotic fruits.
textByHashes.d03d5396fdc3a9b5637e7bdfe63d3f0206f55cdf: But of course! Their juice is an excellent source of energy for runners, and in the riper varieties they are known to heighten one's Thieving abilities.
textByHashes.ca3576f86ad348c6ab195a7cbbaa1fa4356c5ac9: Yawn! Nice talking to you then, no-fur.
